message:
🧪 fix: address Copilot review on UnifiedStatBlock tests (#8528) (#8544)

- Fix valueSource to use { type: 'field', path } matching StatValueSourceField type
- Mock useIsModeSwitching from '../demo' instead of unused modeTransition/cn mocks
- Fix onClick shape to use { target } matching StatBlockAction type
- Add assertion to click test, remove unused locals
- Replace redundant .toBeDefined() with .toBeInTheDocument() from jest-dom

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
